title: BRAINFUSE HELPNOW - 211info
text: WASHINGTON COUNTY COOPERATIVE LIBRARY SERVICES BRAINFUSE HELPNOW Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides study and practice tests for AP exams, SAT, American College Testing (ACT), General Educational Development (GED), Armed Services Vocational Aptitude Battery (ASVAB), and US Citizenship. Also provides assistance with writing assessments and provides tutoring for math, reading, writing, science, and social studies. Confidential Address Eligibility: Washington County library card holder Writing assistance and tutoring: K-12 students Hours: All other services: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Tutor: 7 days per week 1pm-10pm, closed holidays Email Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County Services: Citizenship Education GED/High School Equivalency Test Instruction Tutoring Services Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - MANGO LANGUAGES EMPLOYMENT - JOB AND CAREER HELP INFORMATION SERVICES - LIBRARY MAIL SERVICE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WASHINGTON COUNTY COOPERATIVE LIBRARY SERVICES
